description: Hyper-local weather forecasts and conditions for any mountain location and elevation, worldwide. Provides current conditions, hourly forecasts, 5-day day/night snow forecasts, resort snow reports, and expert-written Daily Snow posts. Authentication via api_key query parameter (partnership access only).

tools.name: daily-reads_content_get-daily-snow
tools.description: Retrieve the most recent Daily Snow post — a written forecast authored by an OpenSnow meteorologist. Includes post body, author info, and related announcements. Access level 10. Required: id_or_slug.

params.name: id_or_slug
params.description: Unique id (integer) or slug (string) for the Daily Read region. Examples: colorado, telluride, tahoe

tools.name: forecast_get-by-point
tools.description: Get a forecast for any lng,lat point on earth (on land). Returns current conditions, hourly detail, day/night periods, and optional rolled-up multi-hour summaries. Access level 5. Required: point, elev. Optional: units (default: imperial), current (default: true), hours (default: 0) (plus 4 more).

params.name: point
params.description: lng,lat pair as comma-separated string, rounded to 4 decimals (e.g. -105.2705,40.015)

params.name: elev
params.description: Elevation at the forecast point (feet if imperial, meters if metric)

params.name: hours
params.description: Number of hourly forecast periods to return (0-24)

params.name: days
params.description: Number of daily forecast periods to return (0-5)

params.name: rollup_duration
params.description: Duration of each rollup period in hours (3-24)

params.name: rollup_current
params.description: If true, first rollup starts at current hour; if false, rollups align to 6am/6pm

tools.name: forecast_get-detail
tools.description: Get a 5-day forecast for any named OpenSnow location. Returns current, hourly, and daily forecasts along with location metadata. Access level 10. Required: id_or_slug. Optional: units (default: imperial).

params.name: id_or_slug
params.description: A unique integer id or string slug for the OpenSnow location (e.g. 1, alta, steamboat)

tools.name: forecast_get-snow-detail
tools.description: Get a 5-day day + night snowfall forecast for any named OpenSnow location. Periods split into daytime (6am-6pm) and overnight (6pm-6am) segments. Access level 10. Required: id_or_slug. Optional: units (default: imperial).

tools.name: snow-report_get
tools.description: Retrieve the most recent snow report — resort-reported snowfall, base depth, operating status, and conditions. Access level 10. Required: id_or_slug. Optional: units (default: imperial).

params.name: id_or_slug
params.description: Location id (integer) or slug (string). Examples: 1, alta, steamboat
